category_title: Gifted student with impulse control disorder and depression exhibiting perfectionism and transition difficulties
scenario_title: Perfectionism and distress during mind-games task completion
minimal_context: The student is completing a working paper consisting of mind-games right before the lunch break.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the working paper consisting of mind-games. Please start working on the questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Erases and re-writes over and over again, working on the details) I am not finished yet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep working on it. We will be breaking off for lunch soon.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (In a high voice) I cannot do it but I will!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The application is over now. Please return your paper so we can go to lunch.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts crying) I will not return my paper unless I solve all the questions! I cannot do it but I will!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the working paper consisting of mind-games. Please start working on the questions.

STUDENT: (Erases and re-writes over and over again, working on the details) I am not finished yet.

TUTOR: Keep working on it. We will be breaking off for lunch soon.

STUDENT: (In a high voice) I cannot do it but I will!

TUTOR: The application is over now. Please return your paper so we can go to lunch.

STUDENT: (Starts crying) I will not return my paper unless I solve all the questions! I cannot do it but I will!

task.content: Completing a working paper consisting of mind-games

context.time_context: Right before breaking off for lunch

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the application was over and he was asked to return his paper
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: SD did not want to return his paper and started crying that he would not return his paper unless he solved all the questions. Saying in a high voice 'I cannot do it but I will!'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Perfectionism and distress over incomplete work
related_quotes: I cannot do it but I will!

behavior_patterns.condition: When drawing and feeling his work isn't good enough
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: He erased and re-drawn over and over again, working on the details, and said: 'I am not finished yet.'
Told us that he was not able to draw/paint
related_quotes: My drawing/picture may be not-so-good and maybe you do not like it.
